version_description: This version is taken from the artist playing live and observing their finger patterns.
tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
Chords based off of Luke Combs playing live on acoustic in this video:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XTIECCupHiQ

Chords: [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F/C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Note] In newer footage, Luke plays C, F/C, C, G instead of what's tabbed. Refer to the video above.
[Note] Luke also sometimes accidentally plays an Fmaj7 instead of an F/C.

[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]F/C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]F/C[/ch]
Daddy, I'm afraid, won't you stay a little while?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
Keep me safe 'cause there's monsters right outside[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]F/C[/ch]
Daddy, please don't go, I don't wanna be alone[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
And the second that you're gone they're gonna know[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]F/C[/ch]
Before he went to bed he grabbed my hand and said[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
Just 'cause I'm leavin'[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F/C[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
It don't mean that I won't be right by your side[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
When you need me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F/C[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
And you can't see me in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F/C[/ch]
Just close your eyes and say a prayer[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
It's okay, I know you're scared when I'm not here[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F/C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
But I'll always be right there[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F/C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F/C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Even though I'm leavin', I ain't goin' nowhere[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F/C[/ch]
Dad, we'll be late, and Uncle Sam don't like to wait[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                                     [ch]G[/ch]
He's got a big old plane that's gonna take me far away[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]F/C[/ch]
I know I act tough, but there's a churnin' in my gut[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]
And I just can't call you up when things get rough[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F/C[/ch]
Before I left, he hugged my neck and said[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
Just 'cause I'm leavin'[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F/C[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
It don't mean that I won't be right by your side[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
When you need me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F/C[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
And you can't see me in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F/C[/ch]
Just close your eyes and say a prayer[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
It's okay, I know you're scared when I'm not here[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F/C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
But I'll always be right there[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F/C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F/C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F/C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Even though I'm leavin', I ain't goin' nowhere[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F/C[/ch]
Daddy, I'm afraid, won't you stay a little while?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
I never thought I'd see the day I had to say goodbye[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]F/C[/ch]
Daddy, please don't go, I can't do this on my own[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
There's no way that I can walk this road alone[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F/C[/ch]
Daddy grabbed my hand and said[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
Just 'cause I'm leavin'[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F/C[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
It don't mean that I won't be right by your side[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
When you need me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F/C[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
And you can't see me in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F/C[/ch]
Just close your eyes and say a prayer[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
It's okay, boy, I ain't scared[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F/C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I won't be here, but I'll always be right there[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F/C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F/C[/ch]
Even though I'm leavin', I ain't goin' nowhere[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F/C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
I ain't goin' nowhere[/tab]
